title: GRUNDIG Solar Tealight Set of 2 Diameter 5x2 cm
features: Realistic flickering wick – these solar tea lights have a flickering flame that looks like real candles and creates a warm and cosy atmosphere.
Safe and without batteries – no risk of burns or fallen candles. These tea lights are powered by solar energy, making them safe and environmentally friendly.
Long burning time – when fully charged, these tea lights burn 6-8 hours, perfect for long evenings. They are easy to operate with a switch.
Pack of 2 solar tea lights – the package contains two Grundig solar tea lights with a diameter of approx. 5 cm and a height of approx. 4.7 cm.
Realistic LED candles – the flickering flames of these LED candles with movable flame create the same atmosphere as real candles, without the risk of open flames.
description: With tea lights, you can instantly create a cosy or romantic atmosphere. However, traditional candles can be dangerous as you can burn yourself or accidentally knock them over, with all the consequences that result. With these solar tea lights from Grundig, you don't have to worry about it. You can place them anywhere without the risk of burns or fallen candles. These solar tea lights offer the same atmosphere as real tea lights! Thanks to the flickering flame, they look like real LED candles with movable flame and create the same cosy atmosphere as real candles. Since the tea lights are powered by solar energy, you do not need batteries or plugs. They emit a warm white light and burn on average 6-8 hours when fully charged. You can easily turn them on and off with a switch. The package contains two solar tea lights with a diameter of approx. 5 cm and a height of approx. 4.7 cm. These LED tea lights offer the benefits of LED tea lights and LED candles without the hassle of battery operated or rechargeable LED candles. They combine the advantages of LED tea lights and LED candles and provide a beautiful atmospheric light in any room. Specifications Grundig solar tea lights. Number of pieces: 2
